title: eBay Advertising Unveils New Dashboard, Personalized Insights, and Intuitive Campaign Tools
notes: eBay's advertising platform offering Promoted Listings Standard (cost-per-sale) and Advanced (cost-per-click). Serves 132M buyers with 800K+ sellers promoting 200M+ listings.

title: eBay Academy
notes: Interactive self-guided platform teaching sellers best practices with beginner, intermediate, and advanced course levels. Free to access anytime.

title: Home of small business. Always.
notes: Small Business Ambassador Network empowering policies that impact how sellers buy and sell online. Ambassadors help sellers thrive.

title: eBay Guaranteed Fit
notes: Guarantees automotive parts/accessories fit buyer's vehicle or free returns within 30 days. Uses My Garage tool and compatibility verification. Note: Program called 'eBay Guaranteed Fit' not 'eBay Assured Fit'.

title: eBay Australia | Electronics, Cars, Fashion, Collectibles & More
notes: Official eBay marketplace for Australia region at ebay.com.au

title: eBay Authenticity Guarantee
notes: Complimentary authentication service covering sneakers ($100+), watches ($500+), jewelry ($200+), trading cards ($250+), and handbags ($500+). Items verified by independent authenticators.

title: eBay Motors Site Map
notes: eBay Motors marketplace for vehicles, parts, and accessories. Includes dealer tools, mobile app, and eBay Guaranteed Fit program.

title: Spendable Funds Terms and Conditions
notes: Stored value account issued to selected US sellers to receive and hold funds. Not a bank account; balances are not deposits.

title: eBay Money Back Guarantee
notes: Buyer protection guaranteeing refund for items not received or not as described. Contact seller within 30 days of delivery. Covers purchase price plus original shipping.

title: eBay Canada
notes: Official eBay marketplace for Canada. Operated by eBay Canada Limited, 240 Richmond Street West, Toronto.

title: eBay: In-Store pickup
notes: Free in-store pickup service from select sellers. Buyers receive email when item ready, show voucher at store to collect.

title: Community : Discussion Boards
notes: eBay discussion boards and forums for buyers and sellers. Includes category-specific chat rooms and general discussions.

title: eBay Customer Service
notes: Main customer service and help center for buying, selling, and account questions. HQ located in Salt Lake City, Utah.

title: Mystery deals
notes: Daily rotating limited-time offers and mystery deals page. Updated frequently with new promotions.

title: eBay Developers Program
notes: Developer program with API access, sandbox testing, and tiered loyalty benefits (gold, silver, bronze). Includes concierge service and early product access.

title: Slickdeals / ePN Exclusive Coupon
notes: Promotional coupons including app-exclusive and partner-exclusive offers. Recent example: 20% off with $20 min/$150 max discount (3/1-3/31/24).

title: eBay Charity
notes: Program allowing buyers/sellers to support nonprofits. Community sellers donate 10-100% of sale price; eBay charity sellers receive net proceeds directly. Partners with PayPal Giving Fund.

title: eBay France
notes: Official eBay marketplace for France region at ebay.fr

title: eBay Germany
notes: Official eBay marketplace for Germany region at ebay.de

title: eBay Gift Cards
notes: Gift cards with no expiration or fees, redeemable only at checkout on eBay.com. Available for consumer and business use. Takes up to 4 hours to activate.

title: Buying items with eBay Guaranteed Delivery
notes: Guarantees delivery by specific date (1-4 days). If late, buyers may get voucher (free shipping) or refund (paid shipping), or free returns.

title: eBay Developers Program
notes: Tiered loyalty program (gold, silver, bronze) rewarding developer partners. Benefits include concierge service, business reviews, marketing opportunities, early product access. Full details unveiled Feb 2024.

title: Seller Hub
notes: Draft listings saved for 75 days after last update in Seller Hub. Accessible from Listings tab, can check expiration dates on Manage drafts page.

title: Top Rated Seller Program
notes: Legacy DSR system transitioned to performance metrics including defect rates (0.5% max), case resolution (0.3% max), late shipment (3% max). Part of Top Rated Seller program.
